# Fatu hardware session. Motor order FR,FL,RR,RL hip/thigh/calf. Calf 2:1 gear in mapping.
# motor raw q: [0.1398, 1.2518, -2.3295, -0.1448, -1.1719, 2.3261, -0.1206, 1.1963, -2.4293, 0.1325, -1.1472, 2.3672]
# joint q after sign+gear: [0.1398, 1.2518, -1.1648, -0.1448, 1.1719, -1.1631, -0.1206, 1.1963, -1.2147, 0.1325, 1.1472, -1.1836]
# model reference: [-0.02, 1.08, -2.64, 0.03, 1.08, -2.64, -0.05, 1.08, -2.64, 0.06, 1.08, -2.64]
# bias[i] = sign[i]*gear[i]*q_motor[i] - q_model[i];  q_model = sign*gear*q_motor - bias
